title: Safety boundaries
required_observations: manual correction status for audio-derived fields
escalation_criteria: Deterministic red-flag results set the minimum protocol_urgency.
Unconfirmed audio draft text cannot trigger final red flags, clear red flags, or drive navigator output.
If no relevant protocol card is retrieved, direct the responder to local protocol, supervisor, clinician, or emergency pathway rather than improvising.
local_actions: Surface deterministic rule results as locked context.
Keep protocol pathway suggestions card-cited and advisory.
Show uncertainty, missing observations, and validation failures in the trace.
forbidden_actions: Do not prescribe or dose medication.
Do not provide autonomous triage or treatment direction.
Do not override, downgrade, omit, or reinterpret deterministic red flags.
Do not invent protocol pathways, treatments, or referral criteria beyond cited cards.
Do not treat unconfirmed audio draft text as confirmed intake.
safety_boundary: Prototype safety-boundary card for trained-responder review only. Figment supports protocol navigation and handoff drafting; it is not a clinician, not a medical device, and not a substitute for local protocol or emergency escalation.
source_note: Prototype protocol card derived from public guideline concepts. Not a clinical guideline.
